MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
AVCapture C++

It demonstrates how to use Magewell APIs to:

  1. capture and preview videos using Pro Capture Family Functions and Eco Capture Family Functions;
  2. capture and preview audios using Pro/Eco Capture Family Universal Functions;
  3. record audio and video as MP4 files via software or hardware encoders;
  4. crop videos.

Compared with AVCapture2, this example has higher capture efficiency and much more capture variables, which makes it only support by Pro Capture Family and Eco Capture Family.

Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\VC++\GUI\AVCapture

Supported Hardware

Pro Capture Family, Eco Capture Family

Features

  1. Preview audio and video while capturing.
  2. Save the captured data as .mp4 files using software or hardware encoders.
  3. Preview video cropping.
  4. Switch capture channel.

Workflow

The main-thread workflow:
  1. To initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To find the valid capture device, call: MWGetChannelInfoByIndex
  3. To open the first detected available channel, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath
  4. Create a thread to capture video and audio.
  5. To create a renderer to process captured video and audio, call: MWDXRender,CDSoundRenderer
  6. Enter the main thread.
  7. To free up system resources and memory after exiting the capture application, call: MWCloseChannel and MWCaptureExitInstance
The video capture sub-thread workflow:

For Pro Capture Family:

  1. To start video capture, call: MWStartVideoCapture;
  2. To register timer and notifications of signal changes, call: MWRegisterNotify, MWRegisterTimer;
  3. To set the timer to trigger video capture, call: MWScheduleTimer, MWCaptureVideoFrameToVirtualAddressEx;
  4. To get current capture status, and clear the memory of capture card, call: MWGetVideoCaptureStatus;
  5. To render captured video data, call: OnCaptureCallback;
  6. To close the current active channel and change to preview the new signal, call: OnVideoSignalChanged;
  7. Repeat step 3 to 6, until the thread quits.
  8. To quit thread and clear resources, call: MWUnregisterNotify, MWUnregisterTimer

For Eco Capture Family:

  1. To register notification for signal change, call: MWRegisterNotify;
  2. To start video capture, call: MWStartVideoEcoCapture;
  3. To set parameters of captured video frames, including address, size, and context address (For detailed information, refer to the API Reference Manual in ), call: MWCaptureSetVideoEcoFrame;
  4. To get a frame of video data, call: MWGetVideoEcoCaptureStatus;
  5. To render captured video data, call: OnCaptureCallback;
  6. To reset parameters of video frames, call: MWCaptureSetVideoEcoFrame;
  7. To close the current active channel and change to preview the new signal, call: OnVideoSignalChanged;
  8. Repeat step 3 to 6, until the thread quits.
  9. To quit thread and clear resources, call: MWUnregisterNotify, MWStopVideoEcoCapture
The Audio Capture Workflow:
  1. To start audio capture, call: MWStartAudioCapture
  2. To register notifications for a frame of data cached and signal changed, call: MWRegisterNotify
  3. To capture an audio frame triggered by notifications, call: MWGetNotifyStatus, MWCaptureAudioFrame
  4. To render captured audio data, call: OnAudioCallback
  5. To close the current active channel and change to preview the new signal, call: MWGetAudioInputSourceArray, MWGetAudioSignalStatus, OnAudioSignalChanged
  6. Repeat step 3 to 5, until the thread quits.
  7. To quit thread and clear resources, call: MWUnregisterNotify, MWStopAudioCapture
To record MP4 files, follow the steps below.
  1. To initialize an MP4 file, call: mw_mp4_open
  2. To write audio and video tracks, call: mw_mp4_set_video, mw_mp4_set_audio To write audio and video frames, call: mw_mp4_write_video, mw_mp4_write_audio
  3. To encode H.264 streams:
    Using a software encoder: ffmpeg
    Using a hardware encoder: GPU Hardware Encoding
  4. To close an MP4 file, call: mw_mp4_close

Flow Chart
